feedback.pageSubtitle: Report a bug or share an idea. Bug screenshots are processed safely (PNG).

feedback.screenshotsHint: Files are re-encoded on the server; original filenames are not used.

feedback.errorRateLimit: Too many requests. Try again in an hour.
feedback.errorMail: Email is not configured on the server yet.
feedback.errorFiles: Invalid files or file too large.

legal.cookieText: We use small cookies to keep you signed in and remember your language. After you accept, we may turn on Google Analytics (GA4) for aggregated visit statistics. Content you add in Nibbo (tasks, menu, notes, and so on) is stored as described in the privacy policy.
legal.cookieAckBeforeLink: By tapping “Accept”, you confirm that you have read the
legal.cookieAckAfterLink: and agree to the processing of data and cookies within what it describes.
legal.privacyLead: Nibbo is a cozy space for your family. Below is a plain-language overview of what we collect, why, and what you can do. This is not a substitute for personal legal advice, but it reflects how we intend to be transparent.
legal.privacyDataBody: Account data after Google sign-in: for example name, email, and profile photo if you provide them. Data you enter in the app: family and members, tasks and boards, calendar, menu and recipes (including dish images), notes, budget, subscriptions, shopping lists, assignment notifications, and other content you add. Technical data: cookies for session and language, and routine hosting logs in aggregate form.
legal.privacyPurposeBody: To provide the service: show your data to you and family members, sync changes across devices, keep sign-in secure, and improve stability. We do not sell your personal data or use it for third-party ad networks.
legal.privacyBasisBody: Including: your consent (using the site, the cookie notice, and this policy); performance of the agreement to provide the service; where applicable, legitimate interests (for example abuse prevention and security), within what the law allows.
legal.privacyProcessorsBody: Data is stored on cloud infrastructure (hosting and database), images in object storage of the same class of services. Google sign-in is governed by Google’s policies. When traffic analytics is enabled, Google LLC (Google Analytics, GA4) may also be involved per Google’s policies. Specific vendors may change for technical reasons; the purpose remains processing within operating Nibbo.
legal.privacyRetentionBody: While your account is active and you use the service, or until you delete specific content where the product allows it. After account deletion (when available or upon your request), we aim to remove personal data within a reasonable time except where the law requires longer retention.
legal.privacyRightsBody: Depending on applicable law, you may have rights such as access, rectification, restriction, objection, portability, or erasure. Contact us via feedback — we will review and respond within a reasonable time. You can also manage cookies in your browser and in your Google account settings.
legal.privacyMinorsBody: The service is family-oriented. If you add information about children, do so only with permission from legal guardians and within what the law allows.
legal.privacyCookiesBody: Technical cookies for your session after sign-in and a cookie for language. After you agree in the banner, Google Analytics (GA4) cookies may appear for aggregated traffic statistics; Google processes that data under its own terms. You can clear site data (cookies and local storage) in your browser; you will need to sign in again and pick your language, and the consent banner will show again.
legal.privacyChangesBody: We may update this page; the current version is always here. If changes are material, we may show a reminder in the product or ask you to confirm again.
legal.privacyContactBody: We are glad to answer questions about data and this policy.
legal.privacyBackToSite: Back to the Nibbo product page

roadmapPage.metaDescription: Nibbo development plans: mobile apps, kids mode, AI tips, meal planning, and social features.
roadmapPage.heading: What we’re planning next
roadmapPage.lead: A rough direction for Nibbo — timelines and priorities may shift as we learn from families.
roadmapPage.backToSite: Back to the Nibbo product page
roadmapPage.disclaimer: This is not a legal commitment — just plans and intent. Watch for updates inside the product.
roadmapPage.item1Body: Native or cross-platform clients for iOS and Android so your family can use Nibbo more comfortably on the go.
roadmapPage.item2Body: A separate, more casual interface with limited functionality — less noise and fewer complex screens.
roadmapPage.item3Body: Suggestions for nutrition and spending based on your data — carefully and with privacy in mind.
roadmapPage.item4Body: Menu planning and meal ideas aligned with recommendations and your family’s preferences.
roadmapPage.item5Body: Family games, friends, chats, and shared moments — so Nibbo is not only an organizer but a place to connect.

blogPage.metaDescription: Product news, family tips, and Nibbo updates — cozy and to the point.
blogPage.heading: Blog
blogPage.lead: News, updates, and notes from the team — in our cozy voice.
blogPage.backToSite: Back to the Nibbo product page

adminBlog.coverImageHint: Shown on the blog index card and at the top of the post. Same formats as inline images.

login.subtitle: A cozy place for your family
login.footer: Here you can organize your family and manage household tasks

login.inviteFromEmailHint: Use the same email address the invitation was sent to. After you sign in, you will join the family automatically.

errors.credential_expired: Time ran out before you set a password. Request a new magic link from login.
errors.EmailSignin: We could not send that email. Check the address and try again.

onboarding.modulesTitle: What do we turn on in your home?
onboarding.modulesSubtitle: Pick the modules you want to start with. Enabled sections appear in the menu; you can change this anytime in Family settings.
onboarding.niboTitle: Here is your Nibby in Nibbo
onboarding.niboBody: Nibby is your tiny companion on the home screen: he reacts to your family’s progress and keeps the vibe. Nibbo is the cozy space around him—tasks, calendar, menu, and what matters in one place.

landing.metaDescription: Nibbo brings tasks, calendar, menu, notes, budget, and shopping into one place. Nibby is your lively companion that helps your home stay on rhythm.
landing.heroTitle: Household life in one cozy place — with Nibby beside you
landing.heroLead: Everyone in the family sees the same tasks, calendar, and lists. Nibby on your home screen reacts to your progress and adds warmth to the daily grind.
landing.nibbySlideTitle: Nibby is your home helper — Nibbo is his home
landing.nibbySlideBody: Nibby has settled into your household as a small companion: he senses the rhythm of home, reacts to your progress, and is ready for anything that keeps daily life on track. The name Nibbo is the cozy space around him—one screen for the whole family where tasks, calendar, menu, and lists live together, away from noisy chats.
landing.nibbySlideExtra: No ten browser tabs—just your home and the quiet confidence that what matters is in one place.
landing.nibbySlideHomeLine: Moved in and ready for whatever’s next
landing.nibbySlideUnique: Every family gets a unique Nibby—subtle differences in look and mood so he feels like yours, not a copy-paste mascot.
landing.nibbyStageSubtitle: Your tiny companion on the home screen: reacts to progress, keeps the household rhythm, and never gets lost in chat noise.
landing.nibbyBody: A living mascot next to your chores: finish tasks and Nibby comes alive. Not just an icon—a little rhythm for your home.
landing.hubTitle: One space instead of ten threads
landing.hubBody: Tasks, calendar, menu, notes, expenses, and shopping stay in sync for the whole family—without “please scroll the chat”.
landing.familyBody: Kids and adults share the same plan: who owns what, what to buy, and where to be on Thursday.
landing.closingTitle: Ready to organize home life together?
landing.journeyTitle: From noisy chats to a calm rhythm
landing.journeyMapAria: Interactive map: chat chaos, one Nibbo space, Nibby, calm rhythm
landing.journeyStep1Title: The thread no longer holds the truth
landing.journeyStep1Body: Groceries in one window, events in another, “remind me” notes—truth keeps sliding up the chat.
landing.journeyStep2Body: Tasks, calendar, menu, notes, expenses, and shopping—one shared source of truth for the family.
landing.journeyStep3Body: The mascot reacts to your progress: close tasks and Nibby wakes up—gentle motivation without nagging.
landing.journeyStep4Body: Who does what and when is clear—so there is room for the small things that make a home feel home.
landing.footerCtaSupport: Tasks, calendar, and lists on one screen—away from noisy chats.
landing.footerBrandLine: A cozy CRM for the whole household
landing.leaderboardLead: Complete tasks, earn XP, climb the leaderboard. These are example families — yours could be here too.
landing.trustLine: ✦ Free forever · No credit card · All features included

profile.ollamaHint: Key from ollama.com (cloud models). Stored encrypted. Chat stays off until a key is saved. Reply language follows your UI language in profile.
profile.ollamaDataNotice: With the assistant on, each request sends your chat messages and a compact summary of family data (for example budget and tasks) to Ollama’s servers. Ollama is a separate provider — review their privacy terms yourself. We only store your API key encrypted on our servers; we do not save assistant chat history in the Nibbo database.
profile.ollamaKeyPlaceholder: New key (leave empty to keep current)
profile.ollamaClearConfirm: Remove the saved Ollama key? The assistant chat will turn off.
profile.title: Profile
profile.onlyYouInFamily: Only you are in this family yet
profile.leaveFamilyOwnerConfirm: Leave this family? If there are other members, ownership will be transferred to the first one. A new personal family will be created for you.
profile.leaveFamilyMemberConfirm: Leave this family? A new personal family will be created for you.
profile.acceptInviteConfirm:
Accept invitation to family "{familyName}"?
You will leave your current family. If it's empty, it will be deleted.
profile.deleteAccountHint: Permanent: your profile, sessions, and access to data will be removed.
profile.deleteOwnershipHint: You are the family owner. Pick the next owner — they receive ownership and your contributions in shared data (tasks, notes, etc.).
profile.deleteAccountFinalConfirm: Permanently delete your account? This cannot be undone.
profile.deleteNoEmail: Account email is missing; deletion is unavailable.
profile.deleteNeedSuccessor: Choose who should receive the family.
profile.deleteInvalidEmail: Email does not match your account.
profile.deleteAccountError: Could not delete account. Try again later.
profile.mcpSectionHint: Keys are stored as hashes: for MCP read access and for HTTP /api/v1 when enabled. The secret is shown only once — store it safely.
profile.restApiToggleHint: When off, new keys are MCP read-only only. Turn on to create keys that can call /api/v1 (profile, data reads, task and note writes per scopes).
profile.restApiModeV1ReadWrite: MCP + HTTP read and write (PATCH tasks, PATCH/DELETE notes)
profile.restApiEndpointsHint: Examples: GET /api/v1/me, GET /api/v1/read/tasks, PATCH /api/v1/tasks/{id}, PATCH or DELETE /api/v1/notes/{id}. Header: Authorization: Bearer <token>.
profile.restApiCreateForbidden: Turn on HTTP REST API above first.
profile.mcpCreatedOnceHint: Copy it now. It cannot be shown again.
profile.mcpRevokeConfirm: Revoke this key? Integrations using it will stop working.

badgeDescriptions.first-steps: Your family’s first XP—together you’re officially in motion.
badgeDescriptions.warm-routine: A steady beat of completed tasks—home life keeps rolling.
badgeDescriptions.cozy-family: Cozy isn’t a setting; you proved it’s what you do together.
badgeDescriptions.task-masters: A storm of finished tasks—you’re pulling the whole crew forward.
badgeDescriptions.legend: Legend-tier harmony—your house runs like a well-loved machine.
badgeDescriptions.master-of-nibbo: Five thousand family XP—a rare summit most players never see coming.
badgeDescriptions.secret-big-family: Six or more people in one Nibbo family—this is a real crew, not a coincidence.
badgeDescriptions.secret-buddy-chat-30: Thirty real chats with Nibby—they definitely know your voice now.
badgeDescriptions.secret-feedback-bugs-5: Five solid bug reports—you help Nibbo grow more reliable.
badgeDescriptions.secret-feedback-suggestions-10: Ten ideas that shaped the roadmap—thanks for building with us.
badgeDescriptions.secret-cinephile-10: Ten active watches at once—your evening queue has no chill.
badgeDescriptions.nibby-blob-friend: Nibby feels every tap—friendship without a single sentence.
badgeDescriptions.familyXp20: First family XP—tiny numbers, big morale.
badgeDescriptions.familyXp100: A hundred warmth—Nibbo knows you’re not just visiting.
badgeDescriptions.familyXp200: Two hundred momentum—the week has a confident bounce.
badgeDescriptions.familyXp400: Four hundred spark—you trade intentions for finished work.
badgeDescriptions.familyXp800: Eight hundred XP—the team clicks like clockwork.
badgeDescriptions.familyXp950: Almost a thousand—that “almost” still tastes like victory.
badgeDescriptions.familyXp1500: Fifteen hundred—discipline with a family smile.
badgeDescriptions.familyXp1800: Eighteen hundred—you don’t quit halfway up the hill.
badgeDescriptions.familyXp3200: Thirty-two hundred—you’re here for outcomes, not vibes only.
badgeDescriptions.familyXp6500: Six and a half thousand—scale you can feel from orbit.
badgeDescriptions.familyXp8000: Eight thousand—your home truly lives inside Nibbo.
badgeDescriptions.familyXp10000: Ten thousand together—a number worth bragging (politely).
badgeDescriptions.familyXp12500: Family orbit—you lapped the “we’ll start Monday” crowd.
badgeDescriptions.nibbyTap5: First boops on Nibby—they already remember your mood.
badgeDescriptions.nibbyTap25: Twenty-five taps—Nibby counts on your hello ritual.
badgeDescriptions.nibbyTap75: Seventy-five bursts of attention—Nibby glows back.
badgeDescriptions.nibbyTap120: A marathon of care for Nibby—rare-level devotion.
badgeDescriptions.nibbyTap1000: One thousand taps—Nibby is basically your household mascot on max attention.
badgeDescriptions.secretCinephile10: Ten titles in Watching at once—your mood playlist has no bottom.
badgeDescriptions.secretBigFamily: Six or more members in one Nibbo family—scale you feel in every calendar.
badgeDescriptions.secretBuddyChat30: Thirty chats with Nibby—you’re not visiting; you’re in the conversation.
badgeDescriptions.secretFeedbackBugs5: Five bug reports that landed with the team—you carry product quality.
badgeDescriptions.secretFeedbackSuggestions10: Ten suggestions that shaped the roadmap—your voice gets heard.
badgeDescriptions.secretFamilyBattleWins10: Ten family-battle wins in the mini-game—you’re not a random face in the arena anymore.
badgeDescriptions.statTask1: First credited win—your personal streak begins.
badgeDescriptions.statTask3: Three times you carried tasks to the finish line.
badgeDescriptions.statTask7: Seven closes with you in the mix—results become habit.
badgeDescriptions.statTask15: Fifteen clears—you’re riding the productivity wave.
badgeDescriptions.statTask25: Twenty-five tasks—you’re the engine, not a guest pass.
badgeDescriptions.statEv1: First calendar event with you onboard—plans feel alive.
badgeDescriptions.statEv4: Four dates with you in the roster—shared life, not solo juggling.
badgeDescriptions.statEv12: Twelve events—your family rhythm shows on the grid.
badgeDescriptions.statEv30: Thirty events—you’re anchoring the social calendar.
badgeDescriptions.statNote3: Three notes—a tiny archive already exists.
badgeDescriptions.statNote8: Eight entries—you’re curating the household brain.
badgeDescriptions.statNote20: Twenty notes—family memory sits in steady hands.
badgeDescriptions.statShop2: Two checkmarks—lists shrink without the stress spike.
badgeDescriptions.statShop6: Six items cleared—cart and mood both lighten.
badgeDescriptions.statShop15: Fifteen ticks—you’re officially a list whisperer.
badgeDescriptions.statShop40: Forty items done—the store knows your face (digitally).
badgeDescriptions.statMeal1: First meal slot with you as cook—taste meets planning.
badgeDescriptions.statMeal4: Four meals logged—the menu stops being abstract.
badgeDescriptions.statMeal10: Ten dishes—you keep the kitchen storyline on track.
badgeDescriptions.statMeal25: Twenty-five cook slots—feeding the week without chaos.
badgeDescriptions.statWatch1: First watchlist title—evenings now have candidates.
badgeDescriptions.statWatch3: Three queue picks—a mood playlist is forming.
badgeDescriptions.statWatch8: Eight shows queued—boredom doesn’t get a vote.
badgeDescriptions.earlySettler100: You’re among the first hundred accounts in Nibbo—the ones who opened a home while the place was still fresh.

familyBattle.resultOpponentWinsRound: They got you — you lose a life.

familyBattle.emptyBody: No other families are visible in the leaderboard yet. Invite friends or enable visibility in Family — then rivals appear.

tour.welcomeContent: Nibbo helps your whole family keep home life in one place: tasks, calendar, menu, notes, expenses, and shopping — synced, clear, and organized.
tour.homeContent: This is your home screen: progress, events, tasks, and quick actions in one place.
tour.familyContent: In the Family section you can manage your family, member roles, and participant settings.
tour.xpContent: XP is earned by completing tasks. The more tasks you finish, the more progress you get.
tour.nibboContent: The 3D character reacts to completed tasks: more completed tasks means a stronger and more active Nibbo.
tour.recipesContent: This is where menu planning starts: add recipes, plan meals, and build shopping items from ingredients.
tour.calendarContent: Use it to plan family events and key dates so nothing important is missed.
tour.notesContent: Keep ideas, lists, and home notes organized in categories.
tour.budgetContent: Track family spending, see where money goes, and keep your budget under control.
